subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was read. Thou hadst written regarding Jinab-i-Aqa Husayn-'Alí's intention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه قرائت گردید مرقوم نموده بودید که جناب آقا حسین علی را مقصد
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
